## Week in Review: 2026-03-23 to 2026-03-29

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 19.4.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

- **Liberal**: Avg interest 3.1 (-21.4% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.20)

- **One Nation**: Avg interest 19.4 (-43.1% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.07)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
